reason: The tweet promotes extremist ideology by justifying violence and bloodshed until 'Allah grants victory', and uses takfiri language (declaring others as non-believers) which is characteristic of ISIS rhetoric
taxonomy_labels: Politics and Current Events -> Extremism and Radical Ideologies
Religion and Spirituality -> Islamic Teachings and Quotes
original_post: الكافر من يرتكب نواقض الأسلام بإتفاق العلماء وانتي راجعي عقيدتك والقتل والدماء الى يوم القيامة حتى ينصر الله الحق شئت ام ابيت
